topic: A Sanad office in Muscat moved 40 client work permits off WhatsApp — no missed renewals in six months
format: Open with a SmartPRO Hub product capability, then show the real-world business outcome it enables
post:
40 client work permits. Tracked on WhatsApp. Across 7 different chat groups.

That was one Sanad office in Muscat, before SmartPRO Hub.

Renewals buried in threads. Reminders sent by hand. One missed message away from a compliance issue — or a client who stops trusting you.

Six months after switching: zero missed renewals. All 40 permits in one place, automated deadline alerts running in the background, and a client portal that keeps everyone updated without anyone chasing anyone.

No spreadsheets. No group chats. No follow-up calls.

We built this because Sanad offices were growing their client lists faster than their systems could handle. WhatsApp works fine at 5 clients. At 25, it starts breaking quietly — and you don't always notice until something goes wrong. When it does, the damage isn't just a missed renewal. It's the client who wonders whether you're on top of their file at all.

SmartPRO Hub gives PRO service teams one dashboard for permit tracking, renewal timelines, and client communication. That's it. Nothing falls through the gaps because there are no gaps.

If you're still managing this through messages, the risk is easy to miss — right up until it isn't.

How are you currently tracking renewal deadlines across multiple clients?

Book a 30-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=product-proof
